text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and published at ECCV 2022 by Jinxing Zhou et al., with the official title "Audio-Visual Segmentation" (not "Avsbench: Audio-visual segmentation dataset"). The cited title is an informal/colloquial shorthand referring to the AVSBench dataset introduced in the paper, and the author (Jinxing Zhou et al.) matches exactly. The paper is available on arXiv (2207.05042) and via Springer.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.05042
